acceptance_criteria: The `--sync-todo` command successfully updates TODO.md with current tasks.
All related unit tests pass with 100% coverage.
Documentation for the `--sync-todo` feature is updated in README.md.
LANE-1.description: Develop the `--sync-todo` feature to sync tasks to TODO.md checkboxes as outlined in the TODO markers. This functionality is crucial for maintaining an up-to-date task list and improving project management efficiency. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method sync-todo.
LANE-1.name: Implement `--sync-todo` functionality

acceptance_criteria: TODO.md is updated to reflect current project priorities.
Outdated tasks are removed or marked as completed.
The TODO.md file is reviewed for clarity and relevance.
LANE-10.description: Go through the TODO.md file to clean up any outdated tasks and ensure it reflects the current project priorities. This will help maintain focus on relevant tasks and improve project organization. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method clean-up-todo.
LANE-10.name: Review and clean up TODO.md

acceptance_criteria: Git context extraction returns accurate recent commits and changed files.
Unit tests for the new extraction logic are created and pass.
Documentation is updated to reflect changes in git context extraction.
LANE-2.description: Improve the functionality for extracting git context, including recent commits and changed files, to provide better insights for task generation. This enhancement will help in understanding project evolution and prioritizing tasks effectively. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method enhance-git-context.
LANE-2.name: Enhance Git context extraction

acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover all edge cases for the `sync-todo` feature.
Code coverage for the `sync-todo` feature is above 80%.
All tests pass successfully.
LANE-3.description: Create unit tests to ensure the new `sync-todo` functionality works as expected and handles edge cases. This is essential for maintaining code quality and preventing regressions in future updates. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method add-tests-sync-todo.
LANE-3.name: Add unit tests for `sync-todo` feature

acceptance_criteria: CLI command handling code is refactored and follows best practices.
All existing CLI tests pass without modifications.
Documentation for CLI commands is updated accordingly.
LANE-4.description: Refactor the command handling in the CLI to improve readability and maintainability, especially around the new features added. This will make future enhancements easier and reduce technical debt. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method refactor-cli-handling.
LANE-4.name: Refactor CLI command handling

acceptance_criteria: README.md includes detailed information about the `sync-todo` feature.
All recent changes are documented clearly.
The README passes a markdown linting check.
LANE-5.description: Revise the README.md to include documentation for the new `sync-todo` feature and any other recent changes. Keeping documentation up-to-date is crucial for user adoption and understanding of the project. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method update-readme.
LANE-5.name: Update README with new features

acceptance_criteria: API error handling provides clear and actionable error messages.
All related tests are updated and pass successfully.
Documentation for API error handling is updated.
LANE-6.description: Review and enhance the API error handling to ensure detailed error messages are provided for API failures. This improvement will enhance user experience and debugging capabilities. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method fix-api-error-handling.
LANE-6.name: Fix API error handling

acceptance_criteria: Integration tests cover all major CLI commands.
All integration tests pass successfully.
Documentation for running integration tests is added.
LANE-7.description: Implement integration tests for the CLI commands to ensure they work correctly with the overall system. This will help catch issues that unit tests might miss and ensure the CLI behaves as expected. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method add-integration-tests-cli.
LANE-7.name: Add integration tests for CLI commands

acceptance_criteria: Error messages are clear and provide guidance on resolving issues.
User feedback on error messages is collected and reviewed.
All existing tests pass without modifications.
LANE-8.description: Enhance the error messages provided by the CLI to be more user-friendly and informative. This will improve the overall user experience and make it easier for users to troubleshoot issues. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method improve-cli-error-messages.
LANE-8.name: Improve error messages in CLI

acceptance_criteria: Documentation clearly explains how to use planfile integration.
Examples of usage are included in the documentation.
Documentation is reviewed and approved by at least one team member.
LANE-9.description: Create documentation for the planfile integration feature, explaining how to use it and its benefits. This will help users understand how to leverage this feature effectively. Implementation: invoke koru.autopilot.drive with method document-planfile-integration.
LANE-9.name: Document planfile integration
